queryPosture: project-scoped by default; cross-project only through explicitly authorized lens
groundedAnswerRules: each citation must include recordType, recordId, sourceLineage, and excerpt
no live source URL is shown if source security withholds it
answer must include as-of/capturedAtUtc when source freshness matters
uncited grounded answers must be dropped or refused
refusalRules: refusal copy must distinguish evidence insufficiency vs permission restriction vs out-of-scope
responsibility conclusions require warranty evidence threshold
forbiddenBehaviors: tool calls or live vector/LLM runtime before future gate
